array.string:
set -euo pipefail VPS_HOST="${DEPLOY_VPS_HOST:?请设置 DEPLOY_VPS_HOST 环境变量}" VPS_USER="${DEPLOY_VPS_USER:-openclaw}" VPS_HEARTBEAT_PATH="/opt/openclaw/data/primary_heartbeat" LOG_TAG="clawbot-heartbeat" SSH_TIMEOUT=5 BOT_PROCESS_PATTERN="multi_main.py"
log() { logger -t "$LOG_TAG" "$1" 2>/dev/null || echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $1"; }
if ! pgrep -f "$BOT_PROCESS_PATTERN" > /dev/null 2>&1; then log "Bot 进程未运行 (未找到 $BOT_PROCESS_PATTERN)，跳过心跳发送" exit 0 fi
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%s) HEARTBEAT_CONTENT="bot_alive|${TIMESTAMP}"
if ssh -o "ConnectTimeout=${SSH_TIMEOUT}" \ -o "StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new" \ -o "BatchMode=yes" \ "${VPS_USER}@${VPS_HOST}" \ "echo '${HEARTBEAT_CONTENT}' > ${VPS_HEARTBEAT_PATH}" 2>/dev/null; then log "心跳已发送 (Bot PID: $(pgrep -f "$BOT_PROCESS_PATTERN" | head -1))" else log "心跳发送失败 (SSH 连接超时或拒绝)" fi
